user_query: I'd rather do the ROM than the AGO. Change the activity on Day 3 to the ROM.

updates.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Day 3 > Art Gallery of Ontario

description.from: World-class art museum with Canadian and international collections. Indoor cultural experience in Frank Gehry-designed building. Quiet and contemplative atmosphere.
description.to: Canada's largest museum of world culture and natural history, featuring diverse exhibits from dinosaurs to ancient civilizations.

updates.reasoning: Transformed the Art Gallery of Ontario (AGO) to the Royal Ontario Museum (ROM) as requested. Preserved the 2-hour duration and updated description/highlights to reflect the new museum.
